css:
<!-- Cairo Font -->
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com"/>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cairo:wght@400..700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>

<style>
  /* Reset */
  * {
    border: 0;
    box-sizing: content-box;
    color: inherit;
    font-family: 'Cairo', sans-serif;
    font-size: inherit;
    font-style: inherit;
    font-weight: inherit;
    line-height: inherit;
    list-style: none;
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
    text-decoration: none;
    vertical-align: top;
  }

  html, body {
    direction: rtl;
    font: 14px 'Cairo', sans-serif;
    background: #FFF;
    padding: 10mm;
    margin: 0 auto;
    width: 210mm;
    height: 297mm;
    box-shadow: 0 0 1in -0.25in rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
  }

  @page {
    size: A4;
    margin: 10mm;
  }

  .print-format {
    background: white;
  }

  .letterhead {
    text-align: center;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
  }

  .letterhead img {
    max-width: 100%;
    max-height: 120px;
  }

  h2.ar {
    text-align: center;
    font-size: 20px;
    margin: 10px 0;
    color: #4B0082;
  }

  table {
    font-size: 90%;
    border-collapse: separate;
    border-spacing: 2px;
    width: 100%;
    margin-top: 15px;
    page-break-inside: avoid;
  }

  th, td {
    border-radius: 4px;
    border: 1px solid #ccc;
    padding: 6px 8px;
    text-align: right;
  }

  th {
    background: #E3F2FD;
    color: #000;
    font-weight: bold;
  }

  .label {
    font-weight: bold;
    color: #1a237e;
    margin-bottom: 4px;
    display: inline-block;
  }

  .qr img {
    max-width: 100px;
    height: auto;
    display: block;
    margin: 0 auto;
  }

  .totals td {
    font-weight: bold;
  }

  .notes-table td {
    border: 1px solid #ccc;
    padding: 6px;
    background-color: #f9f9f9;
  }

  .footer-table td {
    border: none;
    padding: 4px;
  }

  .letter-footer {
    margin-top: 30px;
    text-align: center;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: bold;
    color: #000;
  }

  /* Payment Schedule Table Head */
  h3 {
    font-size: 16px;
    color: #333;
    margin-top: 25px;
    margin-bottom: 5px;
    text-align: right;
  }

  /* Print Enhancements */
  @media print {
    * {
      -webkit-print-color-adjust: exact;
    }

    html {
      background: none;
      padding: 0;
    }

    body {
      box-shadow: none;
      margin: 0;
    }

    .add, .cut {
      display: none;
    }

    .print-header {
      position: fixed;
      top: 0;
      left: 0;
      right: 0;
      height: 100px;
      background: white;
      text-align: center;
      padding: 10px 0;
      z-index: 1000;
    }

    .print-body {
      margin-top: 120px;
    }

    table, tr, td, th {
      page-break-inside: avoid !important;
    }

    .page-break {
      page-break-before: always;
    }

    .no-break {
      page-break-inside: avoid;
    }
  }
</style>
